apply.title: Apply to ZeroEn

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to launch — nine steps, zero upfront cost.

discover.name: DISCOVER
discover.desc: We find you through our build-in-public content, Twitter/X posts, Instagram, and developer communities. Or you find us directly at zeroen.dev.

apply.name: APPLY
apply.desc: Submit a detailed application on zeroen.dev. Tell us about your idea, target market, and background. Takes about 10 minutes.

score.name: SCORE
score.desc: We score every application on 4 dimensions: Viability (is this a real problem?), Commitment (are you serious?), Feasibility (can we build it in MVP scope?), Market (is there real demand?). 15+ out of 20 to accept.

onboard.name: ONBOARD
onboard.desc: If accepted, you fill a detailed questionnaire and join a kickoff call. We lock the scope together. Scope is frozen at this point — no feature creep.

build.name: BUILD
build.desc: Development begins. We build your full-stack MVP using Next.js + Supabase. Regular updates in your client dashboard.

launch.name: LAUNCH
launch.desc: We deploy to Vercel. You get 30 days of free support post-launch. You run the staging review and give final sign-off.

operate.name: OPERATE
operate.desc: After launch, the $50/month platform fee begins. This covers hosting, 1 small fix/month, and a monthly analytics PDF report.

grow.name: GROW
grow.desc: New features beyond the original scope are available as per-request charges ($50–2,000 depending on size). Your revenue share kicks in.

upsell.name: UPSELL
upsell.desc: Monthly analytics surface opportunities. WebMori audit service available. We grow with you.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Apply in 10 minutes. We respond within 3 business days.

features.f2: Up to 5 core features agreed at kickoff
Continued hosting on our Vercel Pro
features.f3: 1 small fix or minor change per month

features.f5: Revenue share activates when you earn

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: A Simple Agreement for Future Equity. It means we get 10% of your company if/when you incorporate, with no immediate obligation. If you never incorporate, we get profit-sharing instead.
faq.q2: What happens if I can't pay the $50/mo?
faq.a2: We'll work with you. If the account goes 90 days unpaid, the agreement terminates and we retain full code rights.
faq.q3: Can I change the scope after kickoff?
faq.a3: No. The MVP scope is frozen at kickoff. Additional features are per-request. This protects both of us.
faq.a4: Yes. Design is included in the MVP build using our standard component system (shadcn/ui + custom ZeroEn design).
faq.q5: How long does the build take?
faq.a5: Typically 2–6 weeks depending on scope. Timeline is agreed at kickoff.
faq.a6: That's the point. You bring the idea and domain expertise. We handle all the tech.

cta.title: Ready to build?
cta.subtitle: No upfront cost. No hourly billing. Just equity.
